title: Extra shopkeeper → COA account mappings
content:
Common Nepal shopkeeper phrases mapped to numbered COA accounts:
ghar kharcha / ghar kharcha liyeko → 3003 Drawings (NOT expense)
batti bill / light bill → 6003 Electricity Expense
NEA ko bill → 6003
pasal ko bhada / bhada tireko → 6001 Rent Expense
staff ko talab / manchhe ko talab → 6002 Salary Expense
maal kineko / kharid gareko → 5002 Purchases
bikri bhayo / becheko → 4001 Sales Revenue
supplier ko baki / udharo maal liyeko → 2001 Accounts Payable
booking paisa / advance customer bata → 2002 Advance Received
peshki supplier lai → 1009 Advance to Supplier
